_meta.description: Mayor money-making opportunities and profile-relevant buffs
_meta.sources: Hypixel API (election endpoint) + wiki.fandom.com mayor pages
notes: Active regular candidates: Aatrox, Cole, Diana, Diaz, Finnegan, Foxy, Marina, Paul
Active special candidates: Derpy, Jerry, Scorpius (every 8 SB years)
Retired: Barry (Aug 2022). One-time: Dante, Technoblade (will not return)
Perk pool per mayor is fixed but candidates run with 1-4 perks randomly gained over elections
Special candidates always run with all perks

opportunities.description: Slayer rare drops 20% more common (1.2x MF + flat 20 MF vs slayers)
opportunities.action: Do slayer bosses for RNG drops — best time for expensive slayer drops
opportunities.profit_hint: Varies heavily by slayer tier and RNG

opportunities.action: Level slayers more cheaply — good time to grind slayer XP

opportunities.description: Special global slayer quest with bonus rewards
opportunities.action: Complete the special slayer quest for bonus loot
Stack with Pathfinder for maximum slayer profitability

profile_checks.relevant_if: Has active slayer progress or slayer gear

opportunities.action: Start forge recipes now — they complete 25% faster. Only applies to newly started forges, not retroactive

opportunities.description: Schedules a Mining Fiesta event with bonus mining drops
opportunities.action: Watch for the Mining Fiesta event and mine during it for extra drops
Mine on public islands for faster Mining skill XP
Mine for increased ore drops

opportunities.description: Use Griffin pet + Ancestral Spade to dig mythological creatures
opportunities.action: Buy Griffin pet (25K from Diana NPC) and Ancestral Spade (5K + 32 gold ingots). Dig for Chimera books, Griffin Feathers, Daedalus Stick, and other rare drops
opportunities.profit_hint: Top-tier money maker — Chimera books worth 50-100M+

requirements.note: Griffin pet sold by Diana NPC for 25K coins when she is mayor

opportunities.action: Level pets faster — good time to grind pet XP on pets you're training
Stacks with Mythological Ritual for better drops from digging
Check pet milestones for doubled rewards

profile_checks.relevant_if: Always relevant — Griffin pet is cheap, mythological hunting is profitable at any stage

opportunities.description: Stonks Auction opens — bid on Stock of Stonks items
opportunities.action: Bid on Stock of Stonks at the Stonks Auction, sell on Bazaar for ~2M each
Buy items from NPCs that resell for profit on AH/Bazaar at higher volume
opportunities.profit_hint: Varies by item — check NPC resale profit tables

opportunities.description: Shen's Auction quantity doubled + 2 extra Shen's Special auctions
opportunities.action: More chances at Shen's Auction items — check for profitable flips

opportunities.description: Elected minister appears as candidate with all perks in next election
opportunities.action: No direct money-making — but affects which perks are available next cycle

profile_checks.relevant_if: Always relevant — economy perks benefit everyone

opportunities.description: Pesthunter fortune duration extended to 60m, pest spawn cooldown -20%
opportunities.action: Farm pests for bonus Farming Fortune — longer uptime and faster spawns

opportunities.description: Better trapper rewards, enhanced pelt drops
opportunities.action: Do Trevor trapper quests for more pelts
opportunities.profit_hint: Pelts buy exclusive items from Trevor's shop

opportunities.description: Extra pelts from Trevor quests (stacks with Pelt Belt and Jake's Plushie)
opportunities.action: Stack with GOATed for maximum pelt farming efficiency

opportunities.description: Garden visitors are more generous with rewards
opportunities.action: Accept garden visitors for better rewards than usual

opportunities.description: Party Chests from Spooky Festival mobs, Party Gifts from Jerry's Workshop
opportunities.action: Participate in Spooky Festival for bonus loot and collect gifts

opportunities.description: +30% chocolate from duplicate rabbits during Hoppity's Hunt
opportunities.action: Hunt for Hoppity eggs for bonus chocolate

opportunities.description: One extra event scheduled (Spooky Festival, Mining Fiesta, or Fishing Festival)
opportunities.action: Watch calendar for the bonus event and participate
Participate in Spooky Festival for better drops

profile_checks.relevant_if: Always somewhat relevant — events are open to all

opportunities.action: Fish for more sea creatures — better fishing money
All fishing drops doubled — great time to fish for profit
Fish on public islands for faster Fishing skill XP

opportunities.description: Schedules a Fishing Festival — catch sharks for Shark Tooth Necklace drops and Rod of the Sea
opportunities.action: Participate in Fishing Festival for exclusive drops

profile_checks.relevant_if: Has fishing gear or leveling fishing

opportunities.description: +2 allowed deaths for S+ score on F6/F7 (normally 2, becomes 4)
opportunities.action: Run F6/F7 for easier S+ scores — more lenient death threshold
opportunities.profit_hint: S+ gives better loot table odds

opportunities.action: Grind Catacombs for faster level-ups
Open dungeon chests for better items
Extra completion credit for floor milestones
Minion output doubled — great passive income boost
Combat content is harder — plan accordingly
Avoid heavy AH/bazaar trading — taxes eat into profits
Mining is less efficient — consider skipping mining-heavy activities

opportunities.description: Rotates another mayor's full perks every 6 hours (Aatrox, Cole, Diana, Finnegan, Marina, Paul)
opportunities.action: Track the rotation schedule — plan activities around which mayor's perks are active. Diana slot = mythological hunting, Aatrox slot = slayer farming, etc.
opportunities.profit_hint: Essentially gives access to 6 mayors' perks throughout the term

opportunities.action: Flat stat buff — slightly stronger for all combat content
Free stat buff for everyone

opportunities.description: Better items appear at Dark Auction, more frequent auctions
opportunities.action: Attend Dark Auctions for rare items at better rates
opportunities.profit_hint: Rare DA items can be very profitable to flip

profile_checks.relevant_if: Relevant if you have coins for Dark Auction bidding
